title: Skillet Smoked Chicken
description: A richly flavored and smoky chicken dish cooked to perfection in a skillet.
instructions: Preheat the skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the chicken breasts with garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Add the olive oil to the preheated skillet and sear the chicken for 5 minutes on each side.
Reduce heat to medium-low and continue cooking for an additional 10-12 minutes or until the chicken reaches an internal temperature of 165°F.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Return the skillet to the heat and add the shredded cheddar cheese.
Stir until the cheese is melted and well combined.
Serve the sliced chicken with the cheesy skillet sauce and garnish with chopped chives.
